message:
Failed query: select to_char("date", 'YYYY-MM'), "type", sum("amount") from "transactions" where ("transactions"."user_id" = $1 and "transactions"."date" >= $2-01) group by to_char("transactions"."date", 'YYYY-MM'), "transactions"."type" order by to_char("transactions"."date", 'YYYY-MM')
